personality_one_liner: A cinematic, expensive, and moody luxury salon experience relying on translucent glass, deep slate, and antique gold accents.

spacing.rule: Generous magazine-like rhythms, comfortable vertical space. Do not cram elements together. Maintain thumb-zone reachability for primary CTAs.

do's: Use blur/glass for bottom tab bar, sticky headers over scrolling content, floating action buttons, and featured hero cards.
Always pair blur with a translucent tinted base underneath (≥75% opacity of surface in dark mode) to ensure foreground text remains readable.
dont's: Do not blur form fields, body text regions, or the entire screen.
Do not apply glass to dense lists or generic list rows.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: A cinematic welcome introducing the luxury salon, featured services, and top stylists.

states.loading: Centered minimalist spinner with 'Curating your experience...'
states.error: Message: 'Unable to load salon details' with a 'Retry' button.

screens.layout: Screen root uses safe area. Top: Minimalist header with 'Knott Unisex Salon' wordmark in Cormorant Garamond. Below: Full-bleed Hero image card (using 'hero_home' image) overlaid with a top-to-bottom dark gradient scrim and a primary CTA ('Book Appointment'). Below hero: 'Signature Services' horizontally scrollable glass cards. Further down: 'Meet the Experts' (stylists) using elegant rounded avatars. Bottom tab bar is a frosted glass overlay.

screens.name: Service Catalog
screens.purpose: Categorized listing of all services (Hair, Nails, Makeup, Waxing) with starting prices.

states.empty: Illustration of salon tools + 'No services found.'

screens.layout: Sticky glass header with a segmented control or horizontal pill list for categories (Hair, Nails, Skin). Below: Vertical list of services. Each item has a title, description snippet, price, and a tinted icon container. Images only used for featured category headers (e.g., 'service_nails' for Nails header).

screens.name: Service Detail
screens.purpose: Deep dive into a specific service, pricing tiers, and direct booking entry.
screens.layout: Cinematic full-bleed image at the top (e.g., 'service_makeup') layered with a dark gradient scrim. The content below slides up over the image. Includes Service Title, Time duration, Detailed description, and pricing tiers (e.g., Junior Stylist vs Senior Director). A fixed container at the bottom holds the 'Book Now' primary CTA button, anchored above the safe area.

screens.name: Booking Flow
screens.purpose: Step-by-step local state flow to schedule an appointment.
screens.layout: Progress indicator at the top. Step 1: Date & Time selection (Custom horizontal date picker + grid of time slots). Step 2: Stylist selection (List of stylists with real photos). Step 3: Confirmation summary. Step 4: Success screen with 'appointment_booked' haptic and animated confirmation. Kept local only.

screens.name: Stylists & Team
screens.purpose: Profiles of the salon's top talent and specialists.
screens.layout: 2-column grid layout wrapped with `space-between` and `gap`. Each card has a stylist photo, name, and specialty (e.g., 'Master Colorist').

screens.name: Academy
screens.purpose: Information about Knott's Beauty Academy and courses.
screens.layout: Hero image ('academy_training') with bold serif title 'Knott Academy'. List of courses (Makeup Artistry, Hair Styling) on dark lifted slate cards (`surfaceSecondary`) with duration and 'Enroll' buttons.

screens.name: Profile & My Bookings
screens.purpose: User's local bookings and personal details.
screens.layout: Minimalist header. User's initials in a `brandTertiary` circle avatar. A section for 'Upcoming Appointments' formatted as glass cards showing date, time, and service.

screens.name: Contact
screens.purpose: Location, hours, and direct contact buttons.
screens.layout: Dark map graphic placeholder. Address text ('E-67, Arya Samaj Rd, Uttam Nagar'). Large tactile buttons for 'Call 085060 31314', 'WhatsApp', and 'Get Directions'.

hero_home.alt: Woman getting her hair done in a luxury salon

service_hair.alt: Luxury salon interior with mirrors and modern styling stations

service_nails.alt: Luxury silver nails manicure and styling

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the '6 Glass / Luxe DARK' personality. Do not use plain black (#000000) or plain white backgrounds; rely on the provided deep slate and obsidian tokens.
BANNED: Do not use any blue, indigo, or purple tokens anywhere in the UI. Stick to the defined charcoal and antique gold theme.

Always apply a top-to-bottom dark gradient scrim when rendering text over images (e.g., on the Home Hero or Service Detail screens) to guarantee readability. The bottom stop must be >=70% opacity of `surfaceInverse`.
Implement glass effects (`expo-blur` / `expo-glass-effect`) on the bottom tab bar, sticky section headers, and floating CTA bars. Ensure they are layered over a tinted translucent base.
The booking flow must be entirely local state (no backend). Ensure interactions are snappy and use the specified haptic feedbacks.
Keep typography weights at 400 or 500 maximum. Allow the elegant Cormorant Garamond headings to contrast cleanly against Manrope body text.
Ensure safe area is respected at every screen root. Content must not hide beneath notches or home indicators.
Use single column or multi-column grids correctly per <Spacing_and_Layout> rules. Do not leave trailing empty half-columns on lists.
